issue_prompt: TRUE chunky pixel art inventory icon ONLY. Drawn on an exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large; every logical pixel is one clean flat square block with no smaller detail, smooth gradient, anti-aliasing, blur, or dithering. A single centered Fowl Harvest Equipment item in three-quarter display angle for Roadside Reliquary: a small dented roadside shrine canister with a diner-cream faceplate, teal trim, and a red reflector. The subject long side spans about 26–30 logical pixels, with at least two full magenta cells of clearance on every edge. Flat solid magenta #ff00ff background, nothing else in frame. Selective one-logical-pixel oil-ink outline. Use only named fowl-harvest-24 colors, 8–12 flat colors maximum. Structural members are at least three logical pixels thick. No Character, duck body, scene, shadow, glow, sparks, particles, text, watermark, UI frame, or transparency.
prompt: TRUE chunky pixel art inventory icon ONLY. Drawn on an exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large; every logical pixel is one clean flat square block with no smaller detail, smooth gradient, anti-aliasing, blur, or dithering. A single centered Fowl Harvest Equipment item in three-quarter display angle for Roadside Reliquary: a SMALL dented roadside shrine canister.
